predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Trump is going to win all three of the swing states and he's going to win New York.
predictions.context: Bob is dismissing the significance of the Trump trial testimony, arguing it won't affect the election outcome.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Eventually, it'll come to it... that's probably the first place.
predictions.context: Bob is discussing the college protests and suggests that if the situation escalates, there will be a violent crackdown similar to Kent State, starting at Columbia University.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: I think he's going to bring our economy back.
predictions.context: Bob is defending Donald Trump's image as a common man and predicts his economic policies will be successful if he is re-elected.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: There are three outcomes of this trial. He is found innocent of these crimes, he is found guilty, or we get a hung jury and it's a mistrial, which I think is probably the most likely.
predictions.context: Chad is analyzing the potential outcomes of the Trump hush money trial based on the first week of testimony.
predictions.timeframe: by the conclusion of the trial

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.context: Mary Lou is giving her opinion on whether the testimony in the Trump trial is leaning toward a guilty or innocent verdict.
predictions.timeframe: by the conclusion of the trial

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: I think hung jury too. Because if you have one Trump supporter in that jury, it's a hung jury.
predictions.context: Haley is predicting the outcome of the Trump trial, believing a Trump supporter on the jury will prevent a unanimous verdict.
predictions.timeframe: by the conclusion of the trial

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: No fucking way. Can you imagine the negative campaign ads running against her? She killed a dog. Animal cruelty is the easiest way to get you off the goddamn ballot. No fucking way.
predictions.context: Haley is arguing that Kristi Noem's story about killing her dog will disqualify her from being Trump's vice-presidential running mate.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Yes. You think he would still pick her after this? Yes.
predictions.context: Mary Lou believes Donald Trump will still select Kristi Noem as his running mate despite the controversy over her killing her dog.
